title: m001-enh agent pre-screening score
description: Agent pre-screening output for a credit class creator proposal. See SPEC.md section 5.

proposal_id.description: Unique identifier of the credit class creator proposal

agent_id.description: Address or identifier of the scoring agent (AGENT-001)

score.description: Weighted composite score (0-1000). See SPEC.md section 5.1.

confidence.description: Data availability confidence (0-1000). See SPEC.md section 5.3.

recommendation.description: Agent recommendation derived from score and confidence thresholds. See SPEC.md section 3.

factors.description: Individual factor scores contributing to the composite

rationale_iri.description: KOI IRI pointing to detailed agent analysis rationale

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when score was computed
